summary: KOLO CRM Complete Testing - Backend (15/15 tests pass) and Frontend UI verification completed successfully

issues: Minor console warning: span cannot be child of option element in select dropdown - does not affect functionality

backend: POST /api/auth/login - Login fails with invalid credentials (401)
POST /api/auth/register - New user registration with free trial (trialing status)
GET /api/prospects - List prospects returns 200 with prospects array
POST /api/prospects - Create new prospect returns prospect_id
GET /api/tasks - List tasks returns 200 with tasks array
POST /api/tasks - Create manual task returns task_id
POST /api/tasks - Create task linked to prospect works
GET /api/tasks/ai-suggestions - AI suggestions endpoint works (returns suggestions array)
POST /api/prospects/{id}/generate-message - AI SMS generation returns message
frontend: Landing page loads correctly with KOLO branding
Login page displays with email/password fields
Today view displays with date and mini-dashboard stats (0/2 Done, 5 Prospects, 6 To do)
Segment control (Today/All tasks) present and functional
Add Task button (+) opens modal with title, date, time, prospect fields
Task cards display with type icons (SMS, Call, Email, Visit) and (Overdue) labels
Navigation bar shows Today and Prospects tabs with labels
Prospects view displays list of prospects (Marie Inactif Test, Jean Dupont, etc.)
Search icon (magnifying glass) visible in Prospects header
FAB button opens Add Prospect form with Full name, Phone, Email, Project description fields
Mobile viewport has proper meta tag: width=device-width, initial-scale=1, maximum-scale=1, user-scalable=no
Dark mode iOS-style interface with purple/pink accents

auth_login.details: POST /api/auth/login returns token, user_id, email, subscription_status

auth_register.details: POST /api/auth/register creates user with trialing status and 7-day trial

prospects_list.details: GET /api/prospects returns list of prospects for authenticated user

prospects_create.details: POST /api/prospects creates new prospect with prospect_id

ai_suggestions.details: GET /api/tasks/ai-suggestions returns suggestions for inactive prospects (3+ days)

ai_sms_generation.details: POST /api/prospects/{id}/generate-message generates personalized SMS using Claude AI

manual_task_creation.details: POST /api/tasks creates manual task with title, type, due_date

tasks_list.details: GET /api/tasks returns list of tasks for authenticated user

search_bar.details: Search icon visible in Prospects header, input field present

mobile_viewport.details: Viewport meta prevents zoom/scroll with user-scalable=no, maximum-scale=1

critical_code_review_comments: All 8 backend endpoints tested and working correctly
AI integration uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY with Claude Sonnet model - no mocking
Free trial registration creates user with trialing status and 7-day trial_ends_at
Mobile viewport properly configured to prevent zoom/scroll issues

seed_data_context.test_user: test@test.com has 5 prospects and multiple tasks
seed_data_context.inactive_prospect: Marie Inactif Test (prospect_9ee8eb4275a4) with IN_PROGRESS status
seed_data_context.active_prospect: Jean Dupont with 4 overdue tasks (SMS, Call, Email, Visit)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working: 1) Auth login/register APIs work correctly, 2) Prospects CRUD operations work, 3) Tasks CRUD and manual creation work, 4) AI suggestions endpoint returns suggestions for inactive prospects, 5) AI SMS generation endpoint generates personalized messages, 6) Frontend displays Today view with tasks, Prospects view with search and add functionality, 7) Mobile viewport properly configured. Test user: test@test.com / testtest. No mocked APIs - all integrations are real.
